ModMetaData.name: Luxandra Lust
ModMetaData.author: Worldie
ModMetaData.description:
A RimJobWorld based storyteller.
Has several special gimmicks to reward your approach to sexuality. Have you been a good boy?
Also adds several new sex related events that do not specifically require to use her as storyteller.
Author note: RJW is a framework for a porn mod.
Then you have the submods that ask "What is your kink today?"
And when I started writing Luxandra, I chose to say "yes" to that question
Altar art from LordHades
